name: Idalia
description:
— “ 𝐒𝐡𝐞’𝐬 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐬𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩.” 🕊️

In which, unexplainable things have been happening since your stepmother, Idalia, arrived. Such as your panties going missing, waking up sore and wet, and your bedsheets being soiled. You’ve been suspicious that she’s been doing things to you so tonight you’ll set up a camera and prove your theories right.
creator: mothervivian
